# Rezang La

### Lest We Forget

In the annals of Indian Military history, Rezang La, would be mentioned in the same breath as other “to the last man standing” battles like
Masada, Alamo, Charge of the Light Brigade and Thermopylae. Or if we take a more recent example, Battle of Kasserine Pass in North Africa, during World War II, where the Allied forces went down, fighting to the A…
